general.name: CyberArk EPM Approved System Extensions
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>A2AC7969-85ED-486A-B987-BD0CD12C0B13</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>A2AC7969-85ED-486A-B987-BD0CD12C0B13</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>CyberArk EPM Approved System Extensions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>3FF345A5-9568-47D1-8368-1A51EB8F0E5D</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.system-extension-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>3FF345A5-9568-47D1-8368-1A51EB8F0E5D</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>System Extensions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>AllowUserOverrides</key><true/><key>AllowedSystemExtensions</key><dict><key>DF8U2CCCD8</key><array><string>com.cyberark.CyberArkEPMEndpointSecurityExtension</string><string>com.cyberark.CyberArkEPMNetworkExtension</string></array></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
